src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/StackA.general_idea: Replace external JHipster constants with local application constants for profile checks.

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/aop/lo.general_idea: Replace the JHipster-specific constant for the development profile with a local application constant to decouple from the JHipster library.
Remove the import statement for the JHipster configuration class since its constants are no longer used in this file.
Add the import statement for the local application constants class to support the new constant usage.

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Add Lombok @Getter and @Setter annotations to the main class and inner static classes to replace manual getter/setter methods.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.human_impl: @Getter @Setter public class ApplicationProperties { ... public static class Liquibase { ... } }

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Introduce a nested Liquibase configuration class with an asyncStart boolean property.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.human_impl: private final Liquibase liquibase = new Liquibase(); public static class Liquibase { private Boolean asyncStart = true; }

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Introduce a nested Logging configuration class with file path, size, and history properties.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.human_impl: private final Logging logging = new Logging(); public static class Logging { private String filePath; ... }

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Introduce a nested File configuration class with storage type, upload, share, and path properties.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.human_impl: private final File file = new File(); public static class File { private FileStorageType storageType = FileStorageType.LOCAL; ... }

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Import the FileStorageType enumeration required for the new File configuration properties.
Extract RedissonClient into a dedicated bean to ensure single instance reuse and fix lifecycle issues.
Inject the extracted RedissonClient bean into JCache configuration instead of creating a new instance.
Add a long-TTL cache configuration bean for static data like Tags and CommonCodes.
Register specific cache regions with appropriate TTLs (short for dynamic, long for static) in the customizer.
Remove duplicate cache registration for Board.boardTags to prevent conflicts.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.human_impl: // 버그 수정: Board.boardTags 중복 등록 제거

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Extract Redisson configuration logic into a separate private method for clarity.
Extract TTL configuration logic into a reusable helper method.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.human_impl: private ... buildTTLConfig(RedissonClient redissonClient, long duration, TimeUnit unit) { ... }

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Remove unused GitProperties and BuildProperties fields and their setters.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.human_impl: - private GitProperties gitProperties; - public void setGitProperties(...)

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Remove unused KeyGenerator bean and PrefixedKeyGenerator import.
Suppress deprecation warnings for Redisson setPassword() method pending library upgrade.
Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for local variable type inference.
Add @Configuration and @Profile annotations to properly register the class as a Spring bean conditional on the 'data' profile.
Introduce SLF4J logger instance for debug output within the configuration class.
Define a @PostConstruct method to handle initialization logic, currently serving as a placeholder for Liquibase-managed data.
Replace JHipster framework constant with a local application constant to decouple from the external library.
Remove the import for the JHipster constants class that is no longer used in the file.
Add import for the local constants class to support the new profile definition.
Replaced JHipster-specific profile constant with a project-specific constant to decouple from JHipster defaults.
Added JWT Bearer authentication scheme to OpenAPI components for API documentation.
Defined RFC7807 Problem response schema in OpenAPI components to document error responses.
Applied the defined bearerAuth security requirement to all API operations in the documentation.
Populated OpenAPI info section with title, description, version, contact, and license details.
Added descriptive tags for User Management and Auth API groups in the documentation.
Remove dependency on MvcRequestMatcher and HandlerMappingIntrospector to simplify security configuration.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.human_impl: Removed MvcRequestMatcher.Builder bean and replaced mvc.pattern() calls with standard string patterns in requestMatchers.

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Update CSRF disable syntax to use method reference compatible with newer Spring Security versions.
Replace default OAuth2 entry point and access denied handlers with custom implementations.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.human_impl: Injected CustomAuthenticationEntryPoint and CustomAccessDeniedHandler and assigned them in exceptionHandling and oauth2ResourceServer configs.

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Add security rules for public and private file storage paths based on application properties.
Update static resource permit patterns to match standard Spring Boot static resource locations.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.human_impl: Replaced specific file extension patterns with directory-based patterns like /css/**, /js/**, /images/**, /webjars/**.

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Allow public access to Email OTP authentication endpoints.
Differentiate permissions for file upload operations: allow public reads, require auth for writes, and admin for deletes.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.human_impl: Added specific rules for /api/uploads/**: GET permitAll, POST authenticated, DELETE hasAuthority(ADMIN).

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Allow public access to explicitly marked public API endpoints.
Allow public access to Swagger UI and API documentation endpoints.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.human_impl: Changed /v3/api-docs/** and /swagger-ui/** from hasAuthority(ADMIN) to permitAll().

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Disable JWT token transmission via URI query parameters to prevent exposure in logs and browser history.

Comment out the @Profile annotation to disable production-specific static resource configuration, likely to allow static resources to be served in all profiles or due to a change in how profiles are managed in the new Spring Boot version.
Remove the import for JHipsterConstants as it is no longer used after commenting out the @Profile annotation.
Remove the import for Profile annotation as it is no longer used.
